frames.setting: Outdoor NYC street in front of a Starbucks location; Starbucks Workers United strike picket line; winter weather; urban commercial streetscape with yellow taxis visible
visual_elements: Bernie Sanders in green parka coat
Candidate (Mamdani) in dark coat
Starbucks Workers United green strike signs
Picket signs: 'NO CONTRACT NO STARBUCKS'
Name chyron: 'Claire Valdez' identifying a strike participant
Statistic overlay: '$36.2 Billion' (Starbucks revenue figure)
Media microphones visible
Diverse crowd of striking workers and supporters
Starbucks storefront visible
frames.presentation_style: Campaign solidarity video at a labor strike; documents candidate and Bernie Sanders participating in a Starbucks Workers United picket line; mix of crowd footage and interview-style shots with name chyrons

frames.setting: Same outdoor Starbucks picket line location; Bernie Sanders speaking to media and crowd; candidate present alongside him; strikers with signs in background
visual_elements: Bernie Sanders speaking into media microphones
Candidate standing alongside Sanders
Multiple media cameras and microphones
Starbucks Workers United green union hats and signs
Close-up shots of Sanders and strike participants
Winter outdoor setting with bare trees
frames.presentation_style: Press event documentation at strike line; Bernie Sanders as a prominent visual endorser; candidate shown in solidarity with workers; no text overlays in these frames

on_screen_text: A NEW ERA for NEW YORK CITY
ULP STRIK... (partial: 'Unfair Labor Practice Strike' sign)
frames.setting: Final frame shows candidate and Bernie Sanders with striking workers in front of Starbucks; campaign outro card overlaid
visual_elements: Group photo with candidate, Bernie Sanders, and workers at strike line
Starbucks green union signs and logos
Campaign brand card: 'A NEW ERA for NEW YORK CITY' in red, white, and blue on black background
Candidate smiling with workers and Sanders
Strike signs including partial 'ULP STRIKE' wording
Starbucks storefront in background
frames.presentation_style: Solidarity campaign content closes with standard campaign branding; labor movement framing; Bernie Sanders as a key visual endorser

summary.dominant_setting: Outdoor NYC Starbucks Workers United strike picket line in winter
text_overlay_types: Protest signs captured in-frame ('NO CONTRACT NO STARBUCKS')
